summary: Email Outreach (Phase A) fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 17/17 tests pass in test_email_outreach.py — templates CRUD (13 categories, 6 merge fields, create/list/get/update/duplicate/delete with GET-verified persistence), audience preview (dedup + suppression filter with shape {total_leads:84, with_email:30, deliverable:10, suppressed_or_dupe:20, sample}), campaign lifecycle (POST creates status=sending + email_queue, worker ticks every 5s, sandbox sends fail after 3 retries, stats.failed increments while stats.queued decrements, campaign reaches status=completed), scheduling (mode:'later' with future send_at keeps status=scheduled and worker does NOT send), pause/resume/cancel (all transition states correctly; cancel also flips pending queue items to canceled), analytics (stats + rates for delivery/open/click/bounce + clicks_over_time array), webhook (unknown email_id → {ok:true} no crash), unsubscribe (public GET returns HTML, upserts email into email_suppression, and a subsequent audience/preview correctly excludes the suppressed email from the deliverable set), test-send (sandbox returns 400 with clear 'Test send failed:' detail — never 502). Frontend: login → nav-email → /email → Email Studio renders with tab-campaigns + tab-templates; New template dialog fills name/subject/html, merge-{{name}} chip inserts token, preview-desktop/mobile/dark toggles work, save-template-btn creates the template and it appears in templates-list; New campaign dialog picks template (subject auto-fills), stage-contacted+stage-interested selection triggers audience-preview showing '9 deliverable · 21 with email · 12 suppressed/dupe', create-campaign-btn labeled 'Send to 9' creates campaign in campaigns-list; clicking a campaign card opens campaign-detail dialog with progress bar (9/9 100%), stat cards (sent/delivered/opened/clicked/bounced/failed), rate cards (delivery/open/click/bounce %), and state-dependent pause/resume/cancel controls (correctly hidden for status=completed).

issues: CRA dev-mode 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay for the benign 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' warning was observed once and can momentarily block clicks in tests; it does NOT appear in production builds. Consider suppressing via a small window.addEventListener('error', ...) shim if the noise is a concern.

critical_code_review_comments: email_campaigns.py:207 create_campaign persists a hostname-based public_base_url into app_config every request — fine, but the worker only picks it up on the FIRST empty-base tick then caches indefinitely (base = os.environ.get(...) then base = await _stored_base(db) only if not base). If the ingress hostname changes mid-run, the worker keeps sending unsubscribe links pointing at the old host until process restart. Minor.

email_campaigns.py:245 the queue items copy 'to' from lead['email'] at create-time, but suppression is only re-checked at worker send-time implicitly via nothing — a lead added to suppression AFTER campaign create will still be sent to. Consider re-checking suppression inside _send_one.

email_campaigns.py:407 3-retry policy applies without backoff — if Resend is temporarily rate-limiting, all 3 attempts happen within a single 5s tick window with no delay. Consider exponential backoff via scheduled_for reschedule.

email_campaigns.py:329 unsubscribe endpoint has no CSRF/anti-abuse — anyone knowing (c,l) can suppress a lead. Acceptable for MVP (list-unsubscribe pattern) but note that lead_id is a UUID which is fine.
email_campaigns.py:329 unsubscribe increments stats.unsubscribed on campaign c even if c doesn't exist (no matched doc, no-op) — safe.

server.py:1235 on_startup calls email_router.start_worker(); email_router is defined at line 1286 (module-level, before app.include_router). On_startup handler runs AFTER module load, so ordering is fine; but placing include_router AFTER the startup handler registration reads oddly. Cosmetic.

EmailCampaignDetail.jsx line 87 renders <div data-testid='clicks-chart'> — but from the DOM inspection when there are no click events it appears to be conditionally hidden. Consider always rendering the container (even empty) so tests can locate it deterministically.
EmailStudio.jsx template card testid is data-testid={`template-${t.id}`} — with 0 templates, list is empty; after deletion the list refreshes correctly. No bug, just noting for regression tests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, nav, templates CRUD via UI, campaign create via UI incl. merge fields + preview toggles + audience preview + template auto-fill, campaign detail dialog with progress/stats/rates and correctly state-gated pause/resume/cancel controls all verified)

seed_data_creation: Test run created several TEST_* prefixed templates and campaigns and added at least one lead email to email_suppression via /api/email/unsubscribe. Suppression entries can be cleaned via direct Mongo delete on email_suppression if desired; TEST_ campaigns and templates persist for regression traceability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression: pytest backend/tests/test_email_outreach.py (17 tests, ~30s, needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Campaign worker sandbox timing: with per_minute<=30 the failed-completion loop can take up to ~2.5 min for 10 recipients × 3 retries; the test uses per_minute=120 to keep completion under ~60s. Frontend fully wired: nav-email, tab-campaigns/templates, new-template-btn / new-campaign-btn, template-name/subject/html, merge-{{name/course/email/phone/stage/unsubscribe}} chips, preview-desktop/mobile/dark, save-template-btn, edit-{id}/dup-{id}/del-{id} on template cards, campaign-name, campaign-template select, campaign-subject, stage-{key}, audience-preview, send-now/send-later + send-at + timezone, throttle-per-minute + business-hours, create-campaign-btn (labeled 'Send to N'), campaigns-list with campaign-{id} cards, campaign-detail dialog with campaign-status, progress-label, campaign-progress, stat-sent/delivered/opened/clicked/bounced/failed, rate cards, clicks-chart (conditional), events-list, pause-btn/resume-btn/cancel-btn (state-gated).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in Email Outreach Phase A. Sandbox send failures are expected per Resend domain-verification pending status; the engine correctly retries 3x, marks queue items failed, increments stats.failed while decrementing stats.queued, and finalizes campaign to status=completed on the next empty tick.
